ethProfitability.verdictDetail: No closed measured loop is available yet.
ethProfitability.recommendationLabel: No chain-to-chain ETH family Gateway surface yet
ethProfitability.recommendationDetail: Current ETH-related routes are still dominated by BTC<->ETH or Ethereum-L1 touchpoints, not pure ETH-on-ETH cross-chain loops.
ethProfitability.followUpCommand: npm run scan:quote-surface -- --route-key="bitcoin:0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000->base:0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" && npm run analyze:ethereum-routes -- --write && npm run audit:eth-family-overfit && npm run status:dashboard

tracks.label: bitcoin:0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000->base:0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000

pivotPlan.budgetNote: USD 300 is the configured safety budget and loss cap, not a claim that every viable strategy should naturally fit inside USD 300.

pivots.label: Stablecoin entry/exit loops
pivots.capitalCaveat: Observed loop is dominated by amount mismatch, so the apparent edge is not a valid capital floor.

pivots.label: BTC triangular / flash arbitrage
pivots.capitalCaveat: Triangle datasets do not yet expose a standardized capital notional for sizing.

pivots.label: Gateway wrapped-BTC loops
pivots.capitalCaveat: No exact closed-loop trade notional currently clears policy.

proxySpreadCoveragePlan.nextCommand: npm run quote:dex -- --chains=base,bsc,ethereum --include-stable-entry --route-limit=64 && npm run score:gateway -- --write && npm run report:btc-proxy-spreads && npm run report:proxy-spread-coverage -- --write

notes: Mechanical simulation uses RPC estimation and eth_call only; it is not realized execution proof.
Pre-live execution audit requires plan, submission, receipt, and journal records to stay in sync.
Fork execution requires an external signer and never stores private keys in planner or dashboard code.
liveTrading remains BLOCKED until architecture review and explicit canary approval.
